title: Notification based on new form entry
excerpt: I’ve set a notification automation to fire when a new item is added to a board.  This works when a new item is manually added into the board but doesn’t work when an item is added using a form.  Is there a way to send a …

posts.author: Clint02 (Clint Collins)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve set a notification automation to fire when a new item is added to a board. This works when a new item is manually added into the board but doesn’t work when an item is added using a form. Is there a way to send a notification when a new item is added to a board using a Form entry?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Clint02! Thanks for posting about this

When I try it out the notification does indeed appear in my bell notifications section when I submit the form. Does the automation you have set up on the board look like this?
